source: Out of the Abyss + DMG Underdark
madness_effects_short: The character retreats into their mind, becoming catatonic (stunned)
The character becomes incapacitated with screaming, weeping, or hysterical laughter
The character becomes frightened and must use their action to Dash away from the source
The character begins babbling incoherently and is incapable of speech or spellcasting
The character must use their action each round to attack the nearest creature
The character experiences vivid hallucinations (disadvantage on ability checks)
The character does whatever anyone tells them to do
The character has an overwhelming urge to eat something strange (dirt, slime, offal)
madness_effects_long: Compelled to repeat a specific activity over and over (compulsion)
Extreme paranoia (disadvantage on Wisdom and Charisma checks)
Regards something with intense revulsion, as if affected by antipathy
Experiences a powerful delusion (DM determines details)
Becomes attached to a lucky charm, treats it as sentient and talks to it
Uncontrollable tremors or tics (disadvantage on attack rolls, Dexterity checks, and Dexterity saves)
Suffers amnesia (cannot recall anything before the madness set in)
Whenever damaged, must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom save or go berserk (as berserker axe)

fungal_hazards.name: Zurkhwood grove
fungal_hazards.effect: No hazard; provides shelter and food (edible caps)

fungal_hazards.name: Timmask spores
fungal_hazards.effect: DC 11 Constitution save or poisoned for 1 minute; hallucinate

fungal_hazards.name: Torchstalk
fungal_hazards.effect: Burns brightly when disturbed; 1d6 fire damage in 10ft radius

fungal_hazards.name: Barrelstalk
fungal_hazards.effect: No hazard; contains 1d4+1 gallons of drinkable water

fungal_hazards.name: Bigwig
fungal_hazards.effect: Edible; grants telepathy 30ft for 1 hour after consumption

fungal_hazards.name: Nightlight
fungal_hazards.effect: Sprays phosphorescent spores when disturbed; causes creature to glow for 24 hours

fungal_hazards.name: Ormu
fungal_hazards.effect: Edible; creature must succeed DC 12 Constitution save or be poisoned 1d4 hours

fungal_hazards.name: Pygmywort
fungal_hazards.effect: Edible; creature shrinks to half size for 1 hour (as reduce)

fungal_hazards.name: Ripplebloom
fungal_hazards.effect: Emits a loud shriek when stepped on; alerts all creatures within 100 feet

fungal_hazards.name: Tongue of Madness
fungal_hazards.effect: Edible; creature compelled to speak aloud every thought for 1 hour

drow_patrol_composition.members: 1 drow mage + 1 drow elite warrior + 3 drow + 1d4 quaggoth slaves
1 drow priestess of Lolth + 2 drow elite warriors + 4 drow + 2d4 quaggoth slaves
2 drow elite warriors + 8 drow + 4 quaggoths + 2 giant spiders

demon_influence_effects: Demogorgon's Madness -- creatures in area must save vs. short-term madness every hour
Orcus's Undeath -- dead creatures reanimate as zombies after 1d4 rounds
Yeenoghu's Hunger -- creatures feel insatiable hunger, must eat or gain 1 level of exhaustion
Zuggtmoy's Corruption -- plant life grows twisted, spore clouds (DC 13 Constitution save or poisoned)
Juiblex's Dissolution -- stone and metal slowly corrode, equipment degradation checks hourly
Graz'zt's Charm -- Charisma checks have advantage or disadvantage randomly each hour
Baphomet's Labyrinth -- passages seem to shift, Navigation checks at disadvantage
Fraz-Urb'luu's Deception -- illusions appear real, Insight checks to disbelieve at DC 15

underdark_terrain.notes: Former trade route or natural water channel
Open space, 30-100ft ceiling, possible echoes alert creatures
5ft wide, single file only, Large creatures must squeeze
Must swim or find crossing; current may be strong (DC 12 Athletics)
100-500ft deep; bridge, climb, or fly to cross
Wild magic area; teleportation and divination spells unreliable
Bright light from luminous crystals; no darkvision advantage needed
